summary: Keep the api_key `AuthHeader()` path minimal: return the saved access-key header value directly and omit OAuth-format helper code that the CLI never calls.
reason: Gainsight uses a single API key credential, so the generated OAuth formatting helper and duplicate empty-token guard are dead code in this published CLI.
validated_outcome: `go test ./...`, `cli-printing-press publish validate`, `verify-skill`, and `verify-publish-package` pass after removing the unreachable guard and unused helper.
